hero.alt: Monte do Papa Léguas at dawn
hero.headline: Monte do Papa Léguas

welcome.headline: A Charming Retreat in the Heart of Alentejo
welcome.body:
Located in the heart of the Parque Natural do Sudoeste Alentejano e Costa Vicentina, just 2 km from the charming village of Zambujeira do Mar, Monte do Papa Léguas is a charming retreat where Alentejo reveals itself in all its authenticity.

Combining tradition and elegance, our home is a true invitation to relaxation, celebrating the tones, textures, and timeless simplicity of Alentejo culture. Here every detail is thoughtfully crafted to provide a memorable experience, in perfect harmony with nature.
welcome.imageAlt: Monte do Papa Léguas exterior area with pine trees

spaces.headline: Rooms & Studios
spaces.body: Two types of accommodation, both with the comfort and Alentejo charm that define us.

activities.headline: The Alentejo Coast at Your Doorstep
activities.body: From the Rota Vicentina to wild beaches, wine tasting to Sunset Chaser — unique experiences designed for you.

booking.headline: Book Your Stay
booking.body: Choose your dates and secure the best of the Alentejo Coast.
